title: LotC Magic Box
body:
Welcome to the LotC Magic Box page! This is a utility mod intended for players of the server "Lord of the Craft". Below you'd find all the features it currently offers!

# LotC Keybinds
The mod now adds easily reconfigurable keybinds for common LotC functions and displays a tooltip when they are enabled! (except for staff  functions I don’t know what output they give out lol)

For regular players; sneaking (home key), slow walking (end key), slow horse walk (page down key).

For staff members (binding needed in the Minecraft control menu); vanishing, flying.

 ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f60402e0b9d3d2f17d420655c9b9ad5b858c0ac.png)

An example of the tooltip when you are both sneaking and walking at the same time (O.o)

 

If you want to suggest new commands for this feature, feel free to DM me on Discord or leave a comment on this thread.


# Focused Chat Tooltip

Have you ever sent a roleplay message to OOC? Do you spam type #rp every time before sending a message?

Well, no more!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/babf300f278ab43990cd16d0348d5b95040e4a50.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fed4d23d00f11cc25ba43a0cf0612d8012afb83.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47a1f05a23e12a0b65f8f7354d59d399b5abcc20.png)

The Focused Chat Tooltip!

Now with colors based on the channel you are focused on!

This mod provides you with a tooltip that is always visible on the top left corner of your screen, updating based on the chat you're currently focused on.
